title: Kyle Jewhurst
content:
{{Top|rwp}}
'''Kyle Jewhurst''' wrote the story of [[Nem Bees]] appearing in the [[Databank (original)|Databank]], through the ''[[What's The Story?]]'' feature of [[Hyperspace: The Official Star Wars Fan Club|Hyperspace]].

His alias is "Lord_Hydronium" on [[TheForce.net]], and he is known as {{Srlink|User:Lord Hydronium|Lord Hydronium}} on [[Wookieepedia]].
